_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the systems/architecture/communications used for coordination.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized CoE, federated, and hub-and-spoke models, and the conditions under which each is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-010 (AI, cosine: 0.520), DQ-K-007 (DQ, cosine: 0.518).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.8/10 (raw 0.578). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [architecture, communications, coordination, systems, used] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.865 (P=0.880, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of the systems/architecture/communications used for coordination." and "Knowledge of data and AI organizational design patterns, including centralized C" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.607 ≈ STS 0.578 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [architecture, communications, coordination, systems, used]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, centralized, coe, conditions, data].
